message.content:
Explore the HireLoop codebase at /tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-65904/hireloop and create a comprehensive architecture map. I need:

1. **File/folder tree** — List all directories and key files with what each does
2. **All API routes** — Search server.js and routes/*.js for all express route handlers (app.get, app.post, router.get, router.post, etc.). List the HTTP method, path, and brief description.
3. **All frontend routes** — From client/src/App.tsx, list all Route paths and which component handles each
4. **Database tables** — Read migrations/*.js files and list all CREATE TABLE statements with their columns
5. **Auth flow** — How does authentication work (JWT? Sessions? Both?)
6. **Key services/lib** — What does each file in lib/ do?

Be thorough — read file headers and key sections. Output a structured markdown document.

content.text: I'll explore the HireLoop codebase comprehensively and create a detailed architecture map. Let me start by getting an overview of the directory structure and then diving into the specific components you requested.

Now let me look at the client source files:
Perfect. Now let me read the key files to build the comprehensive architecture map. I'll start with the main server file and App.tsx:

content.content:
1→import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     2→import { AuthProvider, useAuth, getDashboardPath } from '@/contexts/auth-context'
     3→import { ErrorBoundary, RouteErrorBoundary } from '@/components/error-boundary'
     4→import { DashboardLayout } from '@/components/layout/dashboard-layout'
     5→import { LandingPage } from '@/pages/landing'
     6→import { LoginPage } from '@/pages/login'
     7→import { RegisterPage } from '@/pages/register'
     8→import { CandidateDashboard } from '@/pages/candidate/dashboard'
     9→import { RecruiterDashboard } from '@/pages/recruiter/dashboard'
    10→import { PlaceholderPage } from '@/pages/placeholder'
    11→
    12→// Jobs
    13→import { CandidateJobsPage } from '@/pages/candidate/jobs'
    14→import { CandidateJobDetailPage } from '@/pages/candidate/job-detail'
    15→import { RecruiterJobsPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/jobs'
    16→import { RecruiterJobFormPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/job-form'
    17→import { RecruiterJobApplicantsPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/job-applicants'
    18→
    19→// Applications
    20→import { CandidateApplicationsPage } from '@/pages/candidate/applications'
    21→import { RecruiterApplicationsPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/applications'
    22→
    23→// Assessments
    24→import { CandidateAssessmentsPage } from '@/pages/candidate/assessments'
    25→import { AssessmentTakePage } from '@/pages/candidate/assessment-take'
    26→import { JobAssessmentTakePage } from '@/pages/candidate/job-assessment-take'
    27→
    28→// Offers
    29→import { CandidateOffersPage } from '@/pages/candidate/offers'
    30→import { RecruiterOffersPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/offers'
    31→
    32→// Recruiter Assessments
    33→import { RecruiterAssessmentsPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/assessments'
    34→import { RecruiterJobAssessmentPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/job-assessment'
    35→
    36→// Profiles
    37→import { CandidateProfilePage } from '@/pages/candidate/profile'
    38→import { RecruiterCompanyPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/company'
    39→
    40→// Interviews
    41→import { CandidateInterviewsPage } from '@/pages/candidate/interviews'
    42→import { RecruiterInterviewsPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/interviews'
    43→
    44→// Onboarding
    45→import { CandidateOnboardingPage } from '@/pages/candidate/onboarding'
    46→import { RecruiterOnboardingPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/onboarding'
    47→
    48→// Payroll
    49→import { CandidatePayrollPage } from '@/pages/candidate/payroll'
    50→import { RecruiterPayrollPage } from '@/pages/recruiter/payroll'
    51→
    52→// AI Coaching
    53→import { AiCoachingPage } from '@/pages/candidate/ai-coaching'
    54→
    55→// OmniScore (Two-Sided Scoring)
    56→import { CandidateOmniScorePage } from '@/pages/candidate/omniscore'
    57→import { RecruiterOmniScorePage } from '@/pages/recruiter/omniscore'
    58→
    59→// Camera Test (isolation debugging)
    60→import { TestCameraPage } from '@/pages/test-camera'
    61→
    62→// AI Screening (public - candidate completes via invite link)
    63→import { CandidateScreeningPage } from '@/pages/candidate/screening'
    64→
    65→// Debug Pages
    66→import { MockInterviewDebugPage } from '@/pages/debug/mock-interview'
    67→
    68→// Admin
    69→import { AdminLoginPage } from '@/pages/admin/login'
    70→import { AdminAuthGuard } from '@/components/admin-auth-guard'
    71→import { AiHealthPage } from '@/pages/admin/ai-health'
    72→
    73→// Helper: wrap a page element with RouteErrorBoundary
    74→function Safe({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    75→  return <RouteErrorBoundary>{children}</RouteErrorBoundary>
    76→}
    77→
    78→function RoleRedirect() {
    79→  const { user, loading } = useAuth()
    80→
    81→  if (loading) return null
    82→  if (!user) return <Navigate to="/login" replace />
    83→  return <Navigate to={getDashboardPath(user.role)} replace />
    84→}
    85→
    86→function AppRoutes() {
    87→  return (
    88→    <Routes>
    89→      {/* Public routes */}
    90→      <Route path="/" element={<LandingPage />} />
    91→      <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
    92→      <Route path="/register" element={<RegisterPage />} />
    93→      <Route path="/test-camera" element={<TestCameraPage />} />
    94→      <Route path="/screening/:token" element={<CandidateScreeningPage />} />
    95→
    96→      {/* Auto-redirect based on role */}
    97→      <Route path="/dashboard" element={<RoleRedirect />} />
    98→
    99→      {/* Candidate routes */}
   100→      <Route path="/candidate" element={<DashboardLayout />}>
   101→        <Route index element={<Safe><CandidateDashboard /></Safe>} />
   102→        <Route path="jobs" element={<Safe><CandidateJobsPage /></Safe>} />
   103→        <Route path="jobs/:id" element={<Safe><CandidateJobDetailPage /></Safe>} />
   104→        <Route path="applications" element={<Safe><CandidateApplicationsPage /></Safe>} />
   105→        <Route path="profile" element={<Safe><CandidateProfilePage /></Safe>} />
   106→        <Route path="assessments" element={<Safe><CandidateAssessmentsPage /></Safe>} />
   107→        <Route path="assessments/:id/take" element={<Safe><AssessmentTakePage /></Safe>} />
   108→        <Route path="job-assessment/:id" element={<Safe><JobAssessmentTakePage /></Safe>} />
   109→        <Route path="interviews" element={<Safe><CandidateInterviewsPage /></Safe>} />
   110→        <Route path="ai-coaching" element={<Safe><AiCoachingPage /></Safe>} />
   111→        <Route path="omniscore" element={<Safe><CandidateOmniScorePage /></Safe>} />
   112→        <Route path="documents" element={<Safe><PlaceholderPage /></Safe>} />
   113→        <Route path="offers" element={<Safe><CandidateOffersPage /></Safe>} />
   114→        <Route path="onboarding" element={<Safe><CandidateOnboardingPage /></Safe>} />
   115→        <Route path="payroll" element={<Safe><CandidatePayrollPage /></Safe>} />
   116→      </Route>
   117→
   118→      {/* Recruiter routes */}
   119→      <Route path="/recruiter" element={<DashboardLayout />}>
   120→        <Route index element={<Safe><RecruiterDashboard /></Safe>} />
   121→        <Route path="jobs" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobsPage /></Safe>} />
   122→        <Route path="jobs/new" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobFormPage /></Safe>} />
   123→        <Route path="jobs/:id/applicants" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobApplicantsPage /></Safe>} />
   124→        <Route path="jobs/:id/edit" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobFormPage /></Safe>} />
   125→        <Route path="jobs/:id" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobApplicantsPage /></Safe>} />
   126→        <Route path="jobs/:id/assessment" element={<Safe><RecruiterJobAssessmentPage /></Safe>} />
   127→        <Route path="applications" element={<Safe><RecruiterApplicationsPage /></Safe>} />
   128→        <Route path="assessments" element={<Safe><RecruiterAssessmentsPage /></Safe>} />
   129→        <Route path="candidates" element={<Safe><PlaceholderPage /></Safe>} />
   130→        <Route path="interviews" element={<Safe><RecruiterInterviewsPage /></Safe>} />
   131→        <Route path="offers" element={<Safe><RecruiterOffersPage /></Safe>} />
   132→        <Route path="onboarding" element={<Safe><RecruiterOnboardingPage /></Safe>} />
   133→        <Route path="analytics" element={<Safe><PlaceholderPage /></Safe>} />
   134→        <Route path="company" element={<Safe><RecruiterCompanyPage /></Safe>} />
   135→        <Route path="payroll" element={<Safe><RecruiterPayrollPage /></Safe>} />
   136→        <Route path="omniscore" element={<Safe><RecruiterOmniScorePage /></Safe>} />
   137→      </Route>
   138→
   139→      {/* Settings */}
   140→      <Route path="/settings" element={<DashboardLayout />}>
   141→        <Route index element={<Safe><PlaceholderPage /></Safe>} />
   142→      </Route>
   143→
   144→      {/* Debug routes */}
   145→      <Route path="/debug/mock-interview" element={<Safe><MockInterviewDebugPage /></Safe>} />
   146→
   147→      {/* Admin routes — login is public, everything else requires auth */}
   148→      <Route path="/admin/login" element={<AdminLoginPage />} />
   149→      <Route path="/admin/ai-health" element={<AdminAuthGuard><AiHealthPage /></AdminAuthGuard>} />
   150→
   151→      {/* Catch all */}
   152→      <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
   153→    </Routes>
   154→  )
   155→}
   156→
   157→export default function App() {
   158→  return (
   159→    <ErrorBoundary>
   160→      <BrowserRouter>
   161→        <AuthProvider>
   162→          <AppRoutes />
   163→        </AuthProvider>
   164→      </BrowserRouter>
   165→    </ErrorBoundary>
   166→  )
   167→}
   168→

     7→    "start": "node server.js",
